data.content: K-30 plan: 1) Add /login GET handler that renders one-field token form; 2) Add /login POST that ConstantTimeCompares token, sets thimble_session cookie (HttpOnly, SameSite=Strict, Path=/, Max-Age=3600, Secure only when non-loopback), redirects to /; 3) Add /logout GET handler that clears cookie and redirects to /login; 4) Refactor authorized() to read cookie; on miss for protected routes render the login form (200 OK with form, 401 only on wrong token submit); 5) Update all template links/forms to remove ?token= and remove hidden token inputs; 6) Update redirectWith to drop token; 7) Update runWeb to print http://addr/ and a separate Token: line; 8) Update server_test.go: remove ?token, use cookie; new tests for missing cookie, wrong token, correct token + Set-Cookie attrs, subsequent requests, logout. Files: internal/web/server.go, internal/web/template.html, internal/cli/run_web.go, internal/web/server_test.go. Add new internal/web/cookie.go to keep server.go under 500 lines.
